base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sigma_stages — a tile from 1993 mega man x. Sigma Stages 1-4 (asset IDs 86605-86608) — final fortress. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sigma Stages 1-4 (asset IDs 86605-86608) — final fortress; boss-rush + final Wolf Sigma
